Great! You already have the JWT dependencies. Now your `SecurityConfig.java` should work properly. The `JwtAuthenticationFilter` I created extends `OncePerRequestFilter`, which implements the Jakarta servlet `Filter` interface that Spring Security expects.

+package assessment.manager.security;%0D%0A%0D%0Aimport io.jsonwebtoken.Claims;%0D%0Aimport io.jsonwebtoken.Jwts;%0D%0Aimport io.jsonwebtoken.security.Keys;%0D%0Aimport org.springframework.security.core.GrantedAuthority;%0D%0Aimport org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails;%0D%0Aimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;%0D%0A%0D%0Aimport javax.crypto.SecretKey;%0D%0Aimport java.util.Date;%0D%0Aimport java.util.List;%0D%0Aimport java.util.stream.Collectors;%0D%0A%0D%0A@Component%0D%0Apublic class JwtUtil %7B%0D%0A%0D%0A    private final String jwtSecret = %22mySecretKey12345678901234567890%22; // Should be in application.properties%0D%0A    private final int jwtExpirationMs = 86400000; // 24 hours%0D%0A    private final SecretKey key = Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(jwtSecret.getBytes());%0D%0A%0D%0A    public String generateToken(UserDetails userDetails) %7B%0D%0A        List%3CString%3E authorities = userDetails.getAuthorities().stream()%0D%0A                .map(GrantedAuthority::getAuthority)%0D%0A                .collect(Collectors.toList());%0D%0A%0D%0A        return Jwts.builder()%0D%0A                .setSubject(userDetails.getUsername())%0D%0A                .claim(%22authorities%22, authorities)%0D%0A                .setIssuedAt(new Date())%0D%0A                .setExpiration(new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + jwtExpirationMs))%0D%0A                .signWith(key)%0D%0A                .compact();%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    public String getUsernameFromToken(String token) %7B%0D%0A        Claims claims = Jwts.parserBuilder()%0D%0A                .setSigningKey(key)%0D%0A                .build()%0D%0A                .parseClaimsJws(token)%0D%0A                .getBody();%0D%0A        return claims.getSubject();%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%0D%0A    public boolean validateToken(String token) %7B%0D%0A        try %7B%0D%0A            Jwts.parserBuilder()%0D%0A                    .setSigningKey(key)%0D%0A                    .build()%0D%0A                    .parseClaimsJws(token);%0D%0A            return true;%0D%0A        %7D catch (Exception e) %7B%0D%0A            return false;%0D%0A        %7D%0D%0A    %7D%0D%0A%7D

!authHeader.startsWith(%22Bearer %22)) %7B%0D%0A            filterChain.doFilter(request, response);%0D%0A            return;%0D%0A        %7D%0D%0A        %0D%0A        String token =
